# codex-unison

> Persistent memory for OpenAI Codex CLI — powered by Unison. Wires the Unison brain into Codex CLI's hooks system so your coding agent remembers your stack, preferences, prior decisions, and lessons learned across every project.

Agents: start with [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md) — it covers install, auth, and usage in one page.

## Docs
- [README.md](README.md): overview, quickstart, features, configuration reference, commands, skills
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): how an AI agent installs, authenticates, and uses this integration; contributing guide
- [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md): development setup, conventions, PR checklist
- [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md): vulnerability reporting and credential handling

## Usage
Install the hooks into Codex CLI:
```bash
npx codex-unison install
```
Set your Unison API key:
```bash
export UNISON_TOKEN="usk_live_..."
```
Start Codex — memory is now active automatically.

## Examples
```bash
# Check install status
npx codex-unison status

# Headless / CI auth (provision a key)
curl -X POST https://brain.unisonlabs.ai/v1/auth/provision \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"email":"you@example.com"}'
# Then: export UNISON_TOKEN="usk_live_..."
```
